posts.text:
Every Jewish community deserves a place to come together during loss.

Neshama connects Toronto and Montreal families with obituary listings, shiva meal coordination, and local kosher vendors — all in one place.

Link in bio → neshama.ca

#JewishCommunity #TorontoJewish #MontrealJewish #Shiva #JewishLife #NeshamaCa

Not sure what to bring to a shiva house? 🥞

Our guide covers everything — food ideas, kosher considerations, non-food gifts, timing etiquette, and what to avoid.

Read the full guide: neshama.ca/what-to-bring-to-a-shiva

#ShivaHouse #JewishMourning #TorontoJewish #KosherFood #ShivaFood #JewishTradition

Yahrzeit reminders, handled for you. 🕯️

Enter your loved one’s name and date — Neshama calculates the Hebrew calendar date and sends you a reminder every year, automatically.

Set yours up at neshama.ca/yahrzeit

#Yahrzeit #JewishMemorial #HebrewCalendar #JewishCommunity #NeverForget #NeshamaCa
